Tai nguyen Tabler da duoc chuan hoa theo cau truc vendor:
- dist/vendor/tabler/tabler.css
- dist/vendor/tabler/tabler.js
- dist/vendor/tabler-icons/tabler-icons.css
- dist/vendor/tabler-icons/fonts/*

Luu y ban quyen:
- Khong chinh sua ma nguon vendor neu khong bat buoc.
- Luon giu nguyen thong tin license va attribution goc.
